title: Automatic Sugarcane Farm
description: Harvests sugarcane the moment it grows a third block, fully hands-free. Per row: a strip of dirt or sand with water beside it, sugarcane planted on the dirt, and an observer placed behind each cane at the second-block height facing the cane. When the cane grows, the observer detects the block update and pulses a piston in front of the cane that breaks the top, dropping it. A water stream or a row of hoppers under the planting strip collects the drops into a chest. Tile the row as wide as you like; all observers and pistons share the same height. Observers make it instant and silent — no clock needed.
